src_raw: 2018年是全球金融危機發生十周年，十年間國際政經形勢經歷巨大轉變，當中不乏一幕幕超乎最佳編劇所能想像的場景。我在去年的年報指出，2017年金融市場表現是「喜出望外」，同時提到前景「潛藏隱憂」。回顧2018年，或許可形容為「先喜後悲」。環球多個股票指數在1月創出歷史新高後不久，熾熱的投資情緒旋即遇上中美貿易摩擦的冷鋒，加上英國脫歐談判一直拉鋸、地緣政治惡化、美聯儲四次加息等因素，市場樂觀氣氛急劇逆轉，資產價格在年內大幅下跌。MSCI全球指數從高點至低點曾下跌20.3%，全年累跌約一成，是2008年環球金融危機以來表現最差的一年。恒生指數從高點最多曾下跌26.7%，全年下挫13.6%，錄得七年來最大年度跌幅。
mt_raw: 2018 marked the tenth anniversary of the global financial crisis. Over the past decade, the international political and economic landscape has undergone significant changes, featuring many scenes that would have been unimaginable even for the best screenwriters. In my annual report last year, I noted that the performance of financial markets in 2017 was "unexpectedly positive," while also pointing out that the outlook carried "hidden concerns." Looking back at 2018, it could be described as "initially optimistic but ultimately disappointing." After major stock indices reached record highs in January, the bullish sentiment quickly met a cold front of US-China trade tensions, the prolonged Brexit negotiations, worsening geopolitical situations, and four Federal Reserve interest rate hikes. The market optimism rapidly reversed, leading to significant declines in asset prices during the year. The MSCI Global Index fell 20.3% from its peak to trough, ending the year down approximately 10%, marking the worst performance since the 2008 Global Financial Crisis. The Hang Seng Index dropped as much as 26.7% from its peak, finishing the year down 13.6%, recording the largest annual decline in seven years.

src_raw: 儘管外圍形勢波動難測，香港金融體系仍然保持穩健，貨幣市場運作暢順無阻。實施三十五年的聯繫匯率制度成功應對了資金流出港元的考驗。自環球金融危機爆發以來，累積約10,000億港元等值的資金流入港元。去年，隨着美國息率上升，港美息差持續擴闊，「沽港元、買美元」套息活動增加，港元兌美元匯率在年初轉弱，2005年制訂的「弱方兌換保證」，自4月首度觸發後，年內再觸發26次。金管局按照既定機制，履行「買港元、沽美元」的弱方兌換保證，有序、透明地在市場承接1,035億港元的港元沽盤。隨着資金流走，一個月香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內累升了105基點，而銀行亦在去年9月美國加息後，上調了最優惠利率。金管局多次和適時通過不同渠道向公眾闡釋「弱方兌換保證」的運作機制，令公眾了解資金流出港元是香港利率正常化的必經過程，也是聯匯制度的正常運作。國際貨幣基金組織在去年年底重申支持香港聯匯制度的立場，特區政府也強調聯匯是香港貨幣穩定的基石。這都有助於穩定香港市民對聯繫匯率的信心。
mt_raw: Despite the volatile external environment, Hong Kong's financial system remained robust, with smooth operations in the money market. The 35-year-old Linked Exchange Rate System successfully withstood the test of capital outflows. Since the outbreak of the Global Financial Crisis, approximately HKD 1 trillion equivalent of capital inflows had accumulated in Hong Kong. Last year, as U.S. interest rates rose, the interest rate differential between Hong Kong and the U.S. continued to widen, prompting increased carry trades of "selling HKD and buying USD." The HKD/USD exchange rate weakened at the beginning of the year, triggering the "weak-side Convertibility Undertaking" mechanism established in 2005 for the first time in April, and subsequently triggered 26 more times within the year. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) fulfilled its obligation under the established mechanism to "buy HKD and sell USD" in an orderly and transparent manner, absorbing HKD 103.5 billion in HKD selling pressure in the market. As capital flowed out, the one-month Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rate (HIBOR) rose by 105 basis points during 2018, and banks also raised their prime rates following the U.S. interest rate hike in September. The HKMA repeatedly and timely explained the operation mechanism of the "weak-side Convertibility Undertaking" through various channels to the public, helping them understand that capital outflows from HKD were an inevitable part of the normalisation of Hong Kong interest rates, and a normal function of the linked exchange rate system. The International Monetary Fund reiterated its support for the linked exchange rate system at the end of last year, and the HKSAR Government also emphasized that the linked exchange rate system is the cornerstone of Hong Kong's monetary stability. These efforts helped maintain public confidence in the linked exchange rate system.

src_raw: 2008年環球金融危機暴露了全球金融系統潛藏的種種弊端及隱患，促使國際間在過去十年協調推出一系列針對金融市場、金融機構的改革，包括在銀行業監管方面，提升企業管治和風險管理。金管局的銀行監管工作重點針對兩方面：一是着眼於銀行資產負債風險的審慎監管，二是銀行的行為操守，二者不可偏廢。資產負債風險監管方面，金管局作為巴塞爾銀行監管委員會(Basel Committee on Banking Supervision)及二十國集團轄下金融穩定理事會(FinancialStability Board)成員，有責任全面落實國際監管標準，確保香港銀行業穩健審慎地經營業務。去年底香港銀行資本充足率達20.3%，不但遠高於國際最低標準要求的8%，也較環球金融危機時的14.7%水平顯著提升。大型銀行去年第四季平均流動覆蓋比率達167.6%，同樣遠高於法定最低要求的90%。與此同時，為避免重蹈環球金融危機時需動用公帑拯救「大得不能倒」金融機構的覆轍，金融穩定理事會制訂了關於金融機構處置機制的國際標準。香港是亞洲區內少數已經全面落實符合機制要求的地區之一，金管局下設的處置機制辦公室正落實該機制的操作細則，要求銀行推行結構性變動令處置預案在需要時能有效實施，去年亦推出了《吸收虧損能力規則》，未來還會陸續推出更多相關規則。
mt_raw: The 2008 Global Financial Crisis exposed numerous hidden problems and risks in the global financial system, prompting coordinated reforms over the past decade in financial markets and institutions, including enhanced corporate governance and risk management in the banking sector. The HKMA's banking supervision focuses on two aspects: prudential regulation of bank balance sheet risks and bank conduct. Both aspects must be given equal attention. Regarding balance sheet risk regulation, as a member of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision and the Financial Stability Board (FSB), the HKMA is responsible for fully implementing international regulatory standards, ensuring that Hong Kong's banking industry operates in a prudent and stable manner. By the end of last year, the capital adequacy ratio of Hong Kong banks reached 20.3%, far exceeding the internationally mandated minimum requirement of 8% and significantly higher than the 14.7% level during the Global Financial Crisis. The average liquidity coverage ratio of large banks in the fourth quarter of last year reached 167.6%, also well above the statutory minimum requirement of 90%. At the same time, to avoid repeating the mistake of using public funds to rescue "too big to fail" financial institutions during the Global Financial Crisis, the Financial Stability Board established international standards for financial institution resolution mechanisms. Hong Kong is one of the few regions in Asia that has comprehensively implemented these requirements. The Resolution Office under the HKMA is currently finalizing the operational details of this mechanism, requiring banks to implement structural changes so that resolution plans can be effectively executed when needed. Last year, we introduced the Loss-Absorbing Capacity Rules, which will further strengthen the resilience of the banking system.

src_raw: 鑑於樓價持續上升，金管局未雨綢繆，在2009至2017年間共推出八輪逆周期措施，確保一旦地產市況逆轉，本港銀行體系有足夠的抗震能力應對衝擊。這些措施成效顯著：新造住宅平均按揭成數由2009年的64%降至2018年底的46%；平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年的41%下調至2018年底的34%。年內銀行信貸錄得4.4%的溫和增長，整體資產質素維持良好，零售銀行不良貸款比率進一步降至0.5%，遠低於國際及本港歷史平均水平。去年銀行業盈利持續增長，整體股東權益回報率連升兩年至13%；多家國際性銀行集團在本港的業務交出了不俗的成績表，成為集團盈利的重要支柱。
mt_raw: Regarding the implementation of countercyclical measures, the HKMA proactively took action between 2009 and 2017, introducing eight rounds of countercyclical measures to ensure that the banking system has sufficient resilience to withstand shocks if the real estate market turns. These measures have proven effective: the average mortgage loan-to-value (LTV) ratio for new residential properties decreased from 64% in 2009 to 46% by the end of 2018; the average debt servicing ratio (DSR) also declined from 41% in 2010 to 34% by the end of 2018. During the year, bank credit recorded a moderate growth of 4.4%, with overall asset quality remaining sound. Retail bank non-performing loan ratio further declined to 0.5%, far below the historical average levels both internationally and locally. Bank profitability continued to grow, with the overall return on equity increasing for two consecutive years to 13%; several international banking groups operating in Hong Kong delivered impressive results, becoming important pillars of their group profits.

src_raw: 在監管銀行的行為操守方面，金管局在2010年增設銀行操守部，促進銀行公平待客，並加強保障消費者權益。要做到標本兼治，除了訂出各種針對銀行營運基本操守的監管要求外，我們近年來大力推動改革銀行文化，鼓勵銀行循管治、獎勵制度、評估與回饋機制三方面推動穩善文化，務求銀行內部做到上行下效，在根本上恢復、提升客戶對銀行的信任和尊重。繼2017年金管局向全港銀行提供具體的指引，金管局在2018年底進一步推出銀行文化的監管措施，包括要求銀行就企業文化和落實有關措施作出自我評估等，令穩善銀行文化的三大支柱能有效執行。
mt_raw: In regulating bank conduct, the HKMA established the Banking Conduct Department in 2010 to promote fair treatment of customers and enhance consumer protection. To achieve comprehensive solutions, besides setting out various regulatory requirements for basic banking operations, we have recently actively promoted reforms in bank culture, encouraging banks to foster a sound banking culture through governance structures, incentive systems, and assessment and feedback mechanisms, aiming to ensure that banks lead by example and restore and enhance customer trust and respect from the root. Following the specific guidance provided to all banks in Hong Kong in 2017, the HKMA further introduced supervisory measures for bank culture at the end of 2018, including requiring banks to conduct self-assessments on corporate culture and the implementation of relevant measures, thereby effectively executing the three pillars of a sound banking culture.

src_raw: 雖然互聯網和移動金融是全球趨勢，金管局去年仍繼續促進普及金融，照顧未能應用新科技的社群。例如我們連同香港銀行公會推動便利店推出長者透過「易辦事」免購物提款服務，有關便利店網絡已增至逾300家；我們並聯絡香港郵政在7家主要位於離島和新界的郵政局推出長者提款易服務。銀行業界響應金管局的建議，年內積極增加無障礙設施，提供傷健共融的銀行服務，例子之一是設有聲音導航的自動櫃員機數目一年內增加逾十倍至超過700部。另外，在金管局積極推動下，我們預期將會陸續有銀行在偏遠地區開設更多實體分行和增設流動銀行服務，便利市民。
mt_raw: Although internet and mobile finance are global trends, the HKMA continued to promote financial inclusion last year, catering to communities unable to access new technologies. For instance, we collaborated with the Hong Kong Association of Banks (HKAB) to launch convenience store services allowing elderly people to withdraw cash without shopping via the "Electronic Payment Services" platform. The convenience store network has now expanded to over 300 outlets. We also partnered with Hongkong Post to introduce the "Easy Withdrawal Service" for the elderly at seven main post offices located in islands and New Territories. The banking sector responded positively to the HKMA's recommendations, actively increasing barrier-free facilities and providing inclusive banking services for people with disabilities. One example is the number of voice navigation ATMs, which increased more than tenfold to over 700 units within a year. Additionally, with the HKMA's active promotion, we expect more banks to open additional physical branches and provide mobile banking services in remote areas, making banking more accessible to residents.

src_raw: 金管局與銀行和科技業界緊密合作，在2017年9月啟動「智慧銀行新紀元」，推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為市民帶來嶄新的支付和銀行服務體驗。2018年的亮點，無疑是在9月正式開通的「轉數快」。它是全球獨一無二的零售快速支付系統，打破香港各種電子支付工具和銀行帳戶之間的屏障，讓市民享受全年無休的港元和人民幣即時轉帳服務。金管局還同步推出全球首個「共用二維碼」標準和應用程式，商戶可憑單個二維碼接通多個電子支付系統。「轉數快」推出以來深受市民歡迎，短短半年，登記紀錄已逾258萬個，日均交易量達6萬宗，平均每宗金額分別20,700港元和38,000元人民幣。
mt_raw: The HKMA closely collaborates with banks and technology companies to drive innovation in the financial sector. In September 2017, we launched the "Smart Banking Era" initiative to promote the development and innovation of fintech in Hong Kong, offering citizens a new experience in payments and banking services. A highlight of 2018 was the official launch of the "Faster Payment System" (FPS) in September. This is the world's only retail faster payment system that breaks down barriers between various electronic payment tools and bank accounts in Hong Kong, enabling citizens to enjoy round-the-clock Hong Kong dollar and RMB instant fund transfer services. The HKMA also simultaneously launched the world's first "common QR code" standard and application, allowing merchants to connect multiple electronic payment systems with a single QR code. Since its launch, the FPS has been widely welcomed by the public, with registration records exceeding 2.58 million within six months, daily transactions reaching 60,000, and average transaction amounts of HKD 20,700 and RMB 38,000 respectively.

src_raw: 去年5月，金管局發出虛擬銀行的認可指引，隨即有33家機構提交虛擬銀行牌照的申請。截至今年四月中，四個牌照已經發出，預期它們將於年內正式投入營運。虛擬銀行有助推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為個人和中小企提供嶄新服務和體驗，並促進普及金融。
mt_raw: Last May, the HKMA issued guidelines for virtual banks, and immediately received applications from 33 institutions for virtual bank licenses. As of mid-April this year, four licenses have been issued, and they are expected to commence operations within the year. Virtual banks help promote the development and innovation of fintech in Hong Kong, providing individuals and SMEs with new services and experiences, and promoting financial inclusion.

src_raw: 此外，金管局在7月發布開放應用程式介面(OpenAPI)框架，銀行將分四階段開放產品和服務的對外接口，開創更靈活、更開放的金融科技環境，讓銀行客戶更便捷地整合帳戶資料、獲取資訊，選取貼合自己需要的服務。年內，共有42項新科技產品使用金管局的金融科技監管沙盒進行測試，當中28項完成試行，有關產品和服務已順利推出市場。
mt_raw: Additionally, the HKMA released an Open Application Programming Interface (Open API) framework in July, under which banks will gradually open external interfaces for products and services in four stages, creating a more flexible and open fintech environment. This allows bank customers to conveniently integrate account information, obtain information, and select services tailored to their needs. Throughout the year, 42 new technological products used the HKMA's Fintech Regulatory Sandbox for testing, with 28 of them completing trials and successfully launching in the market.

src_raw: 香港金融管理局是香港的中央銀行機構，主要職能有4項：在聯繫匯率制度的架構內維持貨幣穩定；促進金融體系（包括銀行體系）的穩定與健全；協助鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位，包括維持與發展香港的金融基建；以及管理外匯基金。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is the central banking institution of Hong Kong, with four core functions: maintaining monetary stability within the framework of the Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS); promoting the stability and soundness of the financial system (including the banking system); assisting in consolidating Hong Kong's status as an International Financial Centre (IFC), including maintaining and developing its financial infrastructure; and managing the Exchange Fund.

The HKMA was subsequently established on April 1, 1993.

src_raw: 金融管理專員的權力、職能及責任由《外匯基金條例》、《銀行業條例》、《金融機構（處置機制）條例》、《存款保障計劃條例》、《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》及其他有關條例明文規定。財政司司長與金融管理專員於2003年6月25日的互換函件，列載彼此在貨幣與金融事務方面的職能與責任的分配，亦披露財政司司長將若干權力轉授金融管理專員。有關函件為公開文件，可於金管局網站查閱。
mt_raw: The powers, duties, and responsibilities of the Chief Executive of the HKMA are explicitly stipulated in the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the Banking Ordinance, the Institutional Restructuring (Resolution) Ordinance, the Deposit Protection Scheme Ordinance, the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance, and other relevant ordinances. A letter exchange between the Financial Secretary and the Chief Executive of the HKMA dated June 25, 2003, outlines the division of responsibilities regarding monetary and financial affairs, and also discloses that the Financial Secretary has delegated certain powers to the Chief Executive of the HKMA. This letter exchange is a public document available on the HKMA website.

mt_raw: The Financial Secretary is responsible for determining the monetary policy objectives and monetary system of Hong Kong. In a letter dated June 25, 2003, addressed to the Chief Executive of the HKMA, the Financial Secretary specified that monetary stability should be maintained through the Currency Board System, keeping the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate at approximately HK$7.80 to US$1. The Chief Executive of the HKMA is responsible for independently achieving these monetary policy objectives, including deciding on the relevant strategies, tools, and implementation methods, and ensuring the stability and soundness of Hong Kong's monetary system.

src_raw:
財政司司長在財經事務及庫務局局長的協助下，負責維持香港金融體系穩定與健全，以及保持香港的國際金融中心地位的政策。為推行這些政策，金融管理專員的職責包括：
- 促進銀行體系的整體穩定與有效運作
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，發展債務市場
- 處理與法定紙幣及硬幣的發行及流通有關的事宜
- 透過發展支付、結算及交收系統，以及在適當情況下負責操作有關系統，促進金融基建的安全與效率
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，促進對香港貨幣及金融體系的信心，並推行適當的發展市場措施，以協助加強香港金融服務的國際競爭力。
mt_raw:
With the assistance of the Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, the Financial Secretary is responsible for maintaining the stability and soundness of Hong Kong's financial system and implementing policies to preserve Hong Kong's position as an International Financial Centre. To implement these policies, the Chief Executive of the HKMA has the following responsibilities:
- Promoting the overall stability and efficient operation of the banking system
- Cooperating with other relevant institutions and organizations to develop the debt market
- Handling matters related to the issuance and circulation of legal tender notes and coins
- Promoting the safety and efficiency of financial infrastructure
- Working with other relevant institutions and organizations to enhance confidence in Hong Kong's currency and financial system, and implementing appropriate market development initiatives to help strengthen Hong Kong's competitiveness in financial services globally
- Managing the Exchange Fund under the authority delegated by the Financial Secretary

mt_raw: When exercising control over the Exchange Fund, the Financial Secretary seeks the advice of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. The Exchange Fund Advisory Committee is established under Section 3(1) of the Exchange Fund Ordinance. This provision requires the Financial Secretary to consult the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee when exercising control over the Exchange Fund. The Financial Secretary serves as the ex-officio Chairman of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, while other members (including the Chief Executive of the HKMA) are appointed by the Financial Secretary upon the authorization of the Chief Executive of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Members are appointed based on their professional knowledge and experience, and their inclusion benefits the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee significantly. Their professional knowledge and experience cover areas such as currency, finance, economics, investment, accounting, management, commerce, and law.

src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。此外，金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。金管局亦舉辦公眾教育活動，透過講座及資訊中心導賞服務，向公眾人士（特別是學生）講解金管局的工作，以及增進市民的金融知識。有關金管局的傳媒聯繫工作、刊物及公眾教育活動的詳細資料，見「機構職能」一章。
mt_raw: The HKMA strives to achieve the highest international standards of transparency, maintaining extensive contact with the media while publishing various bilingual journals and special publications. The HKMA's bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk) includes dedicated sections featuring economic research, statistical data, consumer information, and other topics, as well as publications, press releases, speeches, and briefing materials issued by the HKMA. Additionally, the HKMA utilizes social media platforms to communicate more effectively with the public in the digital age. The HKMA's Information Centre comprises a library and exhibition hall, open to the public six days a week. The HKMA also conducts public education programmes, offering guided tours and educational sessions to the public, particularly students, to explain the HKMA's work and enhance public financial literacy. Detailed information on the HKMA's media relations, publications, and public education activities can be found in the "Institutional Functions" chapter.

src_raw: 金管局公布外匯基金及貨幣發行局帳目資料的次數，一直逐步增加，內容亦越趨詳細。金管局於1999年開始參與國際貨幣基金組織的中央銀行「數據公布特殊標準」計劃。金管局亦公布外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下貨幣發行委員會的會議紀錄，以及貨幣發行局制度運作報告。自1996年起，金管局網站亦載有銀行業監管政策及指引。
mt_raw: The HKMA has gradually increased the frequency of disclosures regarding the Exchange Fund and Currency Board Accounts, with the content becoming increasingly detailed. Since 1999, the HKMA has participated in the International Monetary Fund's (IMF) Special Data Dissemination Standard (SDDS) project. The HKMA also publishes meeting records of the Currency Board Committee under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, as well as reports on the operation of the Currency Board System. Since 1996, the HKMA's website has included supervisory policies and guidelines on banking.

src_raw: 金管局與立法會的關係對提高問責性及透明度非常重要。金管局總裁承諾每年3次向立法會財經事務委員會簡報金管局各項工作及政策，並回答有關查詢。此外，金管局代表亦會不時出席立法會財經事務委員會及法案委員會會議，闡釋及商討特別事項，以及協助議員審閱條例草案。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains close communication with the Legislative Council to enhance accountability and transparency. The Chief Executive of the HKMA commits to reporting to the Panel on Financial Affairs of the Legislative Council three times annually on the HKMA's work and policies, and answering related queries. In addition, representatives of the HKMA regularly attend panel and committee meetings of the Legislative Council to discuss and deliberate on specific matters, and to assist legislators in reviewing draft bills.

src_raw: 財政司司長行使外匯基金的控制權時，會聽取外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。外匯基金諮詢委員會根據《外匯基金條例》第3(1)條成立。該項條文訂明財政司司長行使對外匯基金的控制權時，須諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。財政司司長為外匯基金諮詢委員會的當然主席，其他委員（包括金融管理專員）則以個人身分，由財政司司長根據香港特別行政區行政長官的授權委任。委員因各具專業知識及經驗而獲委任，他們的加入讓外匯基金諮詢委員會廣受裨益。委員的專業知識及經驗涵蓋貨幣、金融、經濟、投資、會計、管理、商業及法律等範疇。
mt_raw: When exercising control over the Exchange Fund, the Financial Secretary seeks the advice of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. The Exchange Fund Advisory Committee is established under Section 3(1) of the Exchange Fund Ordinance. This provision requires the Financial Secretary to consult the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee when exercising control over the Exchange Fund. The Financial Secretary serves as the ex-officio Chairman of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, while other members (including the Chief Executive of the HKMA) are appointed by the Financial Secretary upon the authorization of the Chief Executive of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Members are appointed based on their professional knowledge and experience, and their inclusion benefits the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee significantly. Their professional knowledge and experience cover areas such as currency, finance, economics, investment, accounting, management, commerce, and law.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會下設5個專責委員會，負責監察金管局特定環節的工作，並透過外匯基金諮詢委員會向財政司司長報告及提出建議。外匯基金諮詢委員會在2018年共舉行5次會議，討論各項與金管局工作有關的事宜，其中大部分事項均由有關的專責委員會事先進行討論。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund Advisory Committee has five sub-committees, which are responsible for overseeing specific aspects of the HKMA's work and submitting recommendations to the Financial Secretary through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. In 2018, the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee held five meetings to discuss various matters related to the HKMA's work, with most of the items discussed having been previously reviewed by the relevant sub-committees.

src_raw: 管治委員會監察金管局的表現，以及就金管局薪酬與服務條件、人力資源政策、財政預算、行政及管治事務，向外匯基金諮詢委員會提出建議。該委員會在2018年共召開5次會議，內容涵蓋金管局的開支預算、表現評估、年度薪酬檢討及策略性規劃事宜。該委員會亦審議金管局定期提交的工作報告。
mt_raw: The Governance Committee oversees the performance of the HKMA and makes recommendations to the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee regarding the HKMA's remuneration and service conditions, human resources policies, financial budget, administrative and governance matters. This committee held five meetings in 2018, covering the HKMA's expenditure budget, performance evaluation, annual pay review, and strategic planning matters. This committee also examined the HKMA's regular progress reports.

src_raw: 審核委員會檢討金管局的財政匯報程序，並評核其內部管控制度是否足夠和有效，以及提交報告。審核委員會負責檢視金管局的財務報表，編製該等報表的組成項目與會計原則，並聯同外部及內部審計師查核其審計範疇與結果。審核委員會各委員在金管局並沒有任何行政職能。該委員會在2018年共召開2次會議，並審議風險委員會及內部審核處的工作報告。
mt_raw: The Audit Sub-Committee reviews the HKMA's financial reporting procedures and evaluates whether its internal control systems are adequate and effective, and submits reports. The Audit Sub-Committee is responsible for examining the HKMA's financial statements, the components and accounting principles used in preparing these statements, and conducting audits together with external and internal auditors on the scope and results of the audit. Members of the Audit Sub-Committee have no administrative roles within the HKMA. This committee met twice in 2018 and reviewed the reports of the Risk Committee and the Internal Audit Division.

src_raw: 貨幣發行委員會監察貨幣發行局制度的運作，並匯報這個作為香港聯繫匯率制度支柱的情況。該委員會負責確保貨幣發行局制度按照既定政策運作、提出改進該制度的建議，以及確保該制度的運作維持高透明度。金管局定期公布貨幣發行委員會的會議紀錄及提交該委員會的貨幣發行局制度運作報告。該委員會在2018年共召開4次會議。
mt_raw: The Currency Board Committee monitors the operation of the Currency Board System and reports on this situation, which forms the cornerstone of Hong Kong's Linked Exchange Rate System. This committee is responsible for ensuring that the Currency Board System operates according to the established policy, proposing improvements to this system, and ensuring that its operations maintain high levels of transparency. The HKMA regularly publishes the meeting records of the Currency Board Committee and submits reports on the operation of the Currency Board System to this committee. The Currency Board Committee held four meetings in 2018.

src_raw: 2018年香港經濟進一步擴張，不過按年增長速度由第1季的4.6%，逐步減慢至第4季的1.3%（表1），並拖累全年增長率由2017年的3.8%下降至3.0%。經濟擴張轉弱，反映本地需求增長減慢以及經濟持續受淨出口所拖累（圖1）。本地方面，私人消費在第1季強勁增長，但其後增長動力減弱，部分反映貿易保護主義升溫令不明朗因素增加，以及本地資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應。由於營商信心脆弱，整體投資支出的增長速度亦放緩。外圍方面，貨品出口於首3季大致保持平穩，但在第4季隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇而顯著轉差。貨品進口亦因為出口帶動的需求轉弱而放緩。相比之下，服務輸出錄得較快的全年增長，部分是受惠於訪港旅遊業表現蓬勃，而服務輸入則由於運輸、商業及其他服務增長而得以大致維持增長動力。按淨額計，貿易差額由2017年的順差轉為2018年的小幅逆差，並拖累本地經濟增長。
mt_raw: Hong Kong's economy further expanded in 2018, but the annual growth rate gradually slowed from 4.6% in Q1 to 1.3% in Q4 (Table 1), dragging down the full-year growth rate from 3.8% in 2017 to 3.0%. The weakening economic expansion reflected slower domestic demand growth and ongoing pressure from net exports (Figure 1). Locally, private consumption recorded strong growth in Q1, but its momentum subsequently weakened, partly reflecting increased uncertainties caused by rising trade protectionism and wealth effects from asset price corrections. Due to weak business confidence, overall investment spending growth also slowed. Externally, goods exports remained broadly stable for the first three quarters but significantly deteriorated in Q4 amid intensifying US-China trade tensions. Goods imports also slowed due to weaker demand driven by exports. In contrast, service exports recorded faster annual growth, partly benefiting from robust inbound tourism, while service imports maintained growth momentum through growth in transportation, business, and other services. On a net basis, the trade balance shifted from a surplus in 2017 to a small deficit in 2018, which weighed on local economic growth.

src_raw: 主要受到港元與美元負息差下的套息活動所影響，港元兌美元匯率在2018年大致回軟。尤其弱方兌換保證在4月、5月及8月被觸發，促使金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）所定，在7.85港元兌1美元的水平，向銀行購入港元及沽出美元。按照聯匯制度的設計，港元貨幣基礎因而收縮，表示銀行同業流動性減少，再加上市場預期美國加息，導致港元銀行同業拆息整體上升。由於銀行體系資金成本上升，銀行於9月下旬在美國聯邦基金利率目標區間上調後，調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。信貸增長方面，部分由於本地經濟增長放緩以及對外貿易表現轉弱，整體銀行貸款的增幅由2017年的16.1%，顯著減慢至2018年的4.4%。
mt_raw: Affected primarily by carry trades under the negative interest rate differential between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar, the Hong Kong dollar weakened against the US dollar in 2018. The weak-side convertibility undertakings were triggered in April, May, and August, prompting the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) to purchase Hong Kong dollars and sell US dollars at the 7.85 Hong Kong dollar-to-1 US dollar level, in accordance with the Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS). As designed, the LERS led to contraction in the Hong Kong dollar monetary base, indicating reduced interbank liquidity. Combined with market expectations of US interest rate hikes, this resulted in an overall increase in interbank interest rates. Due to higher funding costs, banks raised their prime lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points in late September following the adjustment of the US Federal Funds Rate target range.

src_raw: 通脹壓力於2018年略為增加。剔除政府一次性紓緩措施的影響後，基本通脹率由2017年的1.7%低位，升至2018年的2.6%，不過仍屬於溫和水平。當中的住屋租金組成項目增幅較快，反映較早前新簽訂私人住宅租金上升的影響（圖2）。更廣泛的分析顯示，名義勞工成本及商用物業租金增長略為加快，令本地成本壓力更趨明顯。隨着香港部分主要進口來源地通脹上升，進口價格通脹亦因而攀升。
mt_raw: Inflation pressures slightly increased in 2018. After excluding the impact of the Government's one-off relief measures, the underlying inflation rate rose from 1.7% in 2017 to 2.6% in 2018, though still remaining moderate. The housing component showed relatively stronger increases, reflecting the impact of earlier fresh-letting private residential rental increases (Figure 2). A broader analysis showed that nominal labor costs and commercial rents grew slightly faster, making local cost pressures more pronounced. With inflation rising in some major import sources of Hong Kong, import price inflation also surged.

src_raw: 勞工市場狀況在2018年保持穩健（圖3）。失業率由2017年全年的3.1%下降至2018年的2.8%，是自1997年以來的最低水平。當中大部分主要服務行業的失業率都有所回落，特別是住宿及膳食服務業的跌幅更為顯著。隨着總就業人數及私營機構職位空缺進一步增加，整體勞工需求持續增強，而且勞動人口參與率亦輕微上升。在勞工市場狀況趨緊下，實質工資及收入進一步增加。
mt_raw: Labour market conditions remained sound in 2018 (Figure 3). The unemployment rate declined from 3.1% for the whole of 2017 to 2.8% in 2018, the lowest level since 1997. Most major service sectors experienced a decline in unemployment rates, particularly the accommodation and food services sector, which saw a more significant drop. With the number of total employed persons and private-sector vacancies increasing further, overall labour demand continued to strengthen, and the labour force participation rate also rose slightly. With tightening labour market conditions, real wages and income further increased.

src_raw: 香港股市走勢在2018年大幅逆轉。恒生指數在2017年強勁的上升動力帶動下，於2018年1月升上33,484點的歷史高位（圖4）。然而，隨着主要中央銀行收緊貨幣政策、中美貿易摩擦加劇及本地經濟增長放緩引起投資者的憂慮，市場的樂觀情緒急劇逆轉。恒生指數在10月下挫至24,586點的低位，在年底則收報25,846點，較一年前下跌13.6%。然而，平均每日成交額則由2017年的882億港元上升至1,074億港元，本港首次公開招股集資總額亦因數間從事新興及創科產業的企業上市而大幅增加。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong stock market reversed sharply in 2018. Driven by the strong upward momentum in 2017, the Hang Seng Index reached a historical high of 33,484 points in January 2018 (Figure 4). However, as major central banks tightened monetary policies, US-China trade tensions intensified, and local economic growth slowed, causing investors' optimism to reverse rapidly. The Hang Seng Index fell to a low of 24,586 points in October, closing at 25,846 points at year-end, a 13.6% decrease from the previous year. Nevertheless, average daily turnover increased from HK$88.2 billion in 2017 to HK$107.4 billion, and the total fundraising amount from initial public offerings (IPOs) in Hong Kong significantly increased due to the listing of several companies engaged in emerging and innovative sectors.

src_raw: 住宅物業市場在2018年上半年保持暢旺，不過在下半年隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇、環球股市調整及本港最優惠利率上升而有所降溫。整體樓價在7月至12月期間由高位回落9%，然而全年計仍錄得2%的升幅（圖4）。由於一手及二手市場的買賣活動於下半年顯著減少，所以物業成交量在2018年亦較前一年下跌7%至57,247宗。此外，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊，樓價與收入比率以及收入槓桿比率分別為17.0及75.7，兩者均遠高於長期平均水平。另一方面，非住宅物業價格在2018年整體上升，惟接近年底時稍見回落。全年計，價格及租金均進一步上升，租金回報率則維持在低位。
mt_raw: The residential property market remained active in the first half of 2018, but cooled off in the second half amid intensifying US-China trade tensions, global stock market adjustments, and rising prime lending rates in Hong Kong. Overall property prices fell 9% from July to December, but still recorded a 2% increase for the year (Figure 4). Due to the significant reduction in buying and selling activities in both primary and secondary markets in the second half of the year, property transaction volume decreased by 7% to 57,247 transactions in 2018. Additionally, housing affordability remained tight, with the price-to-income ratio and income-gearing ratio standing at 17.0 and 75.7 respectively, both far above long-term averages. Meanwhile, non-residential property prices generally increased throughout 2018, although they showed slight declines near year-end. Throughout the year, both prices and rents continued to rise, while rental yield remained at a low level.

src_raw: 由於全球經濟增長放緩，預期2019年香港經濟增長將會減慢。尤其外圍環境充滿挑戰，預期香港出口表現仍會受壓。本地方面，雖然失業率低企及家庭收入增加將繼續支撐私人消費，但部分由於消費信心減弱及較早前的資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應的影響，預期私人消費增長步伐會放緩。固定資本形成方面，雖然隨着房屋供應增加，樓宇及建造活動應會穩步增長，但面對經濟不明朗因素增加，企業對於資本投資可能會變得更為審慎。政府預測2019年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎2至3%之間，私營機構分析員的最新預測增幅則平均為2.3%。
mt_raw: With global economic growth slowing, it is expected that Hong Kong's economic growth will decelerate in 2019. Particularly, the external environment remains challenging, and Hong Kong's export performance is likely to face continued pressure. Domestically, although the low unemployment rate and rising household income will continue to support private consumption, the growth pace of private consumption is expected to slow due to weakened consumer confidence and the wealth effects from earlier asset price corrections. Regarding fixed capital formation, while building and construction activities are expected to grow steadily with increased housing supply, businesses may become more cautious about capital investments amidst growing economic uncertainties. The Government forecasts that the real GDP growth rate in 2019 will fall within the range of 2% to 3%, while private-sector analysts predict an average growth rate of 2.3%.

mt_raw: With the global economic slowdown, including in Hong Kong, external price pressures and local cost pressures may ease, so inflationary pressures are expected to remain moderate in 2019. Recent declines in new rental agreements for residential properties will also exert downward pressure on inflation. Consensus forecasts suggest an overall inflation rate of 2.2% for 2019, while the Government expects the underlying inflation rate to reach 2.5%. It is anticipated that the labour market will remain tight with sustained economic growth and continued robust inbound tourism. Private-sector analysts expect the unemployment rate to remain around 3% in 2019.

src_raw: 另外，住宅物業市場受眾多外圍及本地因素所影響，其前景並不明朗。外圍方面，中美貿易摩擦的不確定性將有可能影響市場情緒、經濟前景及金融狀況，使香港物業市場前景繼續蒙上陰影。本地方面，雖然經濟增長放緩，但就業情況及收入增長仍大致穩定，或可支持住宅物業需求。本港利率的走勢某程度上視乎美國未來的政策利率變動，惟後者走勢並不明確。長遠而言，由於過去幾年住宅落成量有所增加，加上政府致力增加土地及房屋供應，預期房屋供求缺口或會收窄。
mt_raw: Additionally, the residential property market faces uncertain prospects due to numerous external and local factors. Externally, the uncertainty surrounding U.S.-China trade tensions could affect market sentiment, economic outlook, and financial conditions, continuing to cast a shadow over Hong Kong's property market. Locally, although economic growth has slowed, employment conditions and income growth remain largely stable, which could support residential property demand. The trend in Hong Kong's interest rates will depend to some extent on future changes in U.S. policy rates, although the latter's trajectory remains unclear. In the long run, given the increase in flat completions in recent years and the government's efforts to increase land and housing supply, the supply-demand gap is expected to narrow.

src_raw: 2018年銀行體系繼續穩步增長，資產負債表擴大5.9%。面對經濟不明朗因素持續，例如主要經濟體之間的貿易衝突及加息等，企業在獲取新貸款方面變得較為保守。年內貸款總額增幅放緩至4.4%，而2017年為16.1%。有關增長受在香港使用的貸款（+6.5%）及在香港境外使用的貸款（+2%）同告增加帶動。另一方面，由於環球貿易環境不明朗，貿易融資下跌7.6%。中國內地相關貸款的增長亦由2017年的17.5%放緩至2018年的1.4%。
mt_raw: The banking system continued to grow steadily in 2018, with the balance sheet expanding by 5.9%. Faced with persistent uncertainties, such as trade conflicts among major economies and interest rate hikes, enterprises became more conservative in obtaining new loans. Annual loan growth slowed to 4.4%, compared to 16.1% in 2017. This growth was driven by increases in loans for use in Hong Kong (+6.5%) and loans for use outside Hong Kong (+2%). On the other hand, trade financing declined by 7.6% due to the uncertain global trade environment. Loan growth related to mainland China slowed from 17.5% in 2017 to 1.4% in 2018.

Since these debt securities mainly consist of investment-grade debt instruments issued by governments and banks, the associated credit risk remained at a low level.

terms: {'加息': 'interest rate hikes', '定期存款利率': 'time deposit rates', '貸存比率': 'loan-to-deposit ratio'}
src_raw: 就負債方而言，存款總額在2018年增加5%，較2017年（+8.7%）的增幅小。由於預期美國持續加息，部分銀行上調定期存款利率，吸引存戶將往來及儲蓄存款轉為定期存款，從而鎖定資金。往來及儲蓄存款佔存款總額的比例由對上一年的57.4%，降至2018年底的51.4%，導致資金成本上升。由於存款總額的增長較貸款總額快，整體貸存比率由2017年底的73%稍降至2018年底的72.6%（圖5）。
mt_raw: Regarding liabilities, total deposits increased by 5% in 2018, less than the 8.7% increase in 2017. Due to market expectations of continued interest rate hikes, some banks raised time deposit rates to attract customers to switch from current and savings accounts to time deposits, thereby locking in funds. The proportion of current and savings accounts in total deposits decreased from 57.4% in the previous year to 51.4% at the end of 2018, resulting in higher funding costs. Because the growth in total deposits outpaced the growth in total loans, the overall loan-to-deposit ratio slightly declined from 73% at the end of 2017 to 72.6% at the end of 2018 (Figure 5).

src_raw: 2018年港元利率普遍上升，而港元現貨匯率則回軟，並貼近弱方兌換保證匯率的水平。儘管如此，港元外匯及貨幣市場運作仍然暢順有序。聯繫匯率制度是香港貨幣及金融穩定的基石，並繼續展現其承受強大衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: In 2018, Hong Kong dollar interest rates generally increased, while the spot exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar weakened and approached the level of the weak-side convertibility undertaking. Despite this, the operation of the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange and money markets remained smooth and orderly. The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) remains the cornerstone of Hong Kong's monetary and financial stability, continuing to demonstrate its ability to withstand significant shocks.

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The primary objective of Hong Kong's monetary policy is to maintain monetary stability, i.e., to ensure the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate, keeping the exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar against the US dollar within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar. This currency system primarily adopts the Currency Board Arrangement, which stipulates that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund must provide at least 100% support for the monetary base. Any changes in the monetary base must be accompanied by corresponding increases or decreases in the US dollar reserves, matching the changes in the monetary base on a 100% basis.

mt_raw:
The monetary base (Table 1) includes:
- Certificates of Indebtedness (which fully support banknotes issued by the three note-issuing banks)
- Government-issued notes and coins
- Total balances in settlement accounts held by banks at the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), known as the Aggregate Balance
- Exchange Fund bills and notes issued by the HKMA on behalf of the government.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。若市場對港元的需求大過供應，令市場匯率轉強至7.75港元兌1美元的強方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行沽出港元、買入美元，使總結餘增加及港元利率下跌，從而令港元匯率從強方兌換保證匯率水平回復至7.75到7.85的兌換範圍內。相反，若港元供過於求，令市場匯率轉弱至7.85港元兌1美元的弱方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行買入港元，使總結餘減少及推高港元利率，港元匯率隨之由弱方兌換保證匯率水平回復至兌換範圍內。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to fulfill the convertibility undertakings. If demand for the Hong Kong dollar exceeds supply, causing the market exchange rate to strengthen beyond the strong-side convertibility undertaking rate of 7.75 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar, the HKMA will sell Hong Kong dollars and buy US dollars from banks, increasing the Aggregate Balance and lowering Hong Kong dollar interest rates, thereby bringing the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate back within the 7.75 to 7.85 convertibility zone. Conversely, if there is excess supply of the Hong Kong dollar, causing the market exchange rate to weaken below the weak-side convertibility undertaking rate of 7.85 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar, the HKMA will purchase Hong Kong dollars from banks, reducing the Aggregate Balance and raising Hong Kong dollar interest rates, allowing the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate to return to the convertibility zone from the weak-side convertibility undertaking level.

src_raw: 在港元與美元負息差擴闊帶動套息活動的背景下，港元匯率自年初以來逐步轉弱。於4月12日，弱方兌換保證在2005年訂於7.85水平以來首度被觸發。全年計，弱方兌換保證在2018年合共被觸發27次，分別在4月被觸發13次，5月6次，以及8月8次。儘管如此，港元交易仍然暢順有序，港元匯率於4月中至9月中在弱方兌換保證匯率7.85附近徘徊（圖1）。其後港元匯率略為轉強，部分反映假期、季結及年結臨近，銀行同業流動性收緊，帶動部分套息交易平倉。同時，某程度上港元亦受到11月初股市氣氛好轉支持。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2018年全年正常運作。
mt_raw: Under the backdrop of widening negative interest rate differentials between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar driving carry trades, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate gradually weakened since the beginning of the year. On April 12, the weak-side convertibility undertaking was triggered for the first time since it was set at the 7.85 level in 2005. Throughout the year, the weak-side convertibility undertaking was triggered a total of 27 times in 2018, with 13 triggers in April, six in May, and eight in August. Despite this, Hong Kong dollar transactions remained smooth and orderly, with the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate fluctuating near the weak-side convertibility undertaking rate of 7.85 from mid-April to mid-September (Figure 1). Subsequently, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate slightly strengthened, partly reflecting the approaching holidays, quarter-end, and year-end periods, which tightened interbank liquidity and led to some carry trade unwinding. At the same time, the Hong Kong dollar also received some support from improved stock market sentiment at the beginning of November. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2018.

src_raw: 由於弱方兌換保證被觸發，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2017年底的12,268億港元，下降至2018年底的11,362億港元（圖2）。年內，金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率7.85的水平，購入合共1,035億港元，總結餘因而由2017年底的1,798億港元下降至2018年底的764億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額沒有明顯變動。貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: Due to the triggering of the weak-side convertibility undertaking, the Aggregate Balance and the total amount of outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes decreased from HK$122.68 billion at the end of 2017 to HK$113.62 billion at the end of 2018 (Figure 2). During the year, the HKMA purchased a total of HK$103.5 billion at the weak-side convertibility undertaking rate of 7.85 as requested by banks, according to the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS), resulting in the Aggregate Balance decreasing from HK$17.98 billion at the end of 2017 to HK$7.64 billion at the end of 2018. The total amount of outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes did not show significant changes during the year. The monetary base continued to be fully supported by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 由於觸發弱方兌換保證後銀行同業流動性減少，以及市場預期美國加息，香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內普遍上升。受新股集資活動相關的資金需求增加及季節性流動資金需求帶動，短期銀行同業拆息更出現較大波幅（圖3）。整體而言，短期銀行同業拆息在2018年大致維持在低於基本利率的水平。鑑於銀行體系資金成本上升，在9月下旬美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調後，銀行調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。
mt_raw: Due to reduced interbank liquidity following the triggering of the weak-side convertibility undertaking and expectations of US interest rate hikes, interbank interest rates in Hong Kong generally increased throughout 2018. Short-term interbank rates experienced greater volatility due to increased funding demands related to initial public offerings and seasonal liquidity needs (Figure 3). Overall, short-term interbank rates remained largely below the Base Rate throughout 2018. Given the increase in funding costs for the banking system, banks raised their Best Lending Rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points following the upward revision of the US Federal Funds Rate target range in late September.

src_raw: 因應年內美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍4次合共上調100基點，由1.25至1.50厘上調至2.25至2.50厘，基本利率於3月22日、6月14日、9月27日及12月20日合共上調100基點，由1.75厘上調至2.75厘。基本利率的調整是按照2009年3月26日宣布的經修訂計算公式作出。按照該公式，基本利率定於美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下限加50基點的水平，或隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息的5天移動平均數的平均值水平，以兩者中較高者為準。
mt_raw: With four cumulative increases of 100 basis points to the US Federal Funds Rate target range, from 1.25 to 1.50 percent to 2.25 to 2.50 percent, the Base Rate was increased by 100 basis points on March 22, June 14, September 27, and December 20, rising from 1.75 percent to 2.75 percent. The adjustments to the Base Rate were made in accordance with the revised calculation formula announced on March 26, 2009. According to this formula, the Base Rate is determined as the higher of either (i) 50 basis points above the lower bound of the target range for the US Federal Funds Rate, or (ii) the average of the five-day moving averages of the overnight and one-month Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rates (HIBOR).

src_raw: 港元遠期匯率折讓在首4個月擴大，大致跟隨港元與美元息差的走勢，其中12個月港元遠期匯率點子在4月中達到負620點子（圖4）。其後隨着港元與美元的負息差收窄，港元遠期匯率折讓略為縮小，然後在第4季再度擴大。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2017年的103億港元增至2018年的402億港元。
mt_raw: The forward discount for the Hong Kong dollar weakened in the first four months of the year, broadly following the trend of the negative interest rate differential between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar, with 12-month forward points reaching -620 basis points in mid-April (Figure 4). Subsequently, as the negative interest rate differential narrowed, the forward discount for the Hong Kong dollar slightly contracted before expanding again in the fourth quarter. Overall, the Hong Kong money market continued to operate normally. Discount Window borrowing increased from HK$10.3 billion in 2017 to HK$40.2 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 聯匯制度自1983年實施以來，直是維持香港貨幣及金融穩定的重要基石；並在多次區內以至全球金融危機考驗下，展現其承受強大衝擊的能力。由於港元轉弱，作為聯匯制度設計一部分的弱方兌換保證於4月、5月及8月被多次觸發。資金流出港元，是香港利率正常化的必經過程，亦是聯匯制度下的正常運作。為增進各界對有關操作及聯匯制度機制的了解，金管局致力向公眾闡釋聯匯制度的技術細節，並展示香港金融體系應對衝擊的能力。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，進一步鞏固公眾對政府的承擔，以及港元作為支付及保值貨幣的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在與香港進行2018年第四條磋商時，重申對聯匯制度的支持，並指出聯匯制度仍然是最適合香港的貨幣制度，是維持穩定的支柱，有助確保經濟持續增長、維持競爭力及促進龐大的金融服務業暢順運作。
mt_raw: Since its implementation in 1983, the LERS has been the cornerstone of maintaining Hong Kong's monetary and financial stability, demonstrating its ability to withstand significant shocks during multiple regional and global financial crises. As the Hong Kong dollar weakened, the weak-side convertibility undertaking, part of the LERS design, was triggered multiple times in April, May, and August. The outflow of funds from the Hong Kong dollar is an inevitable process in the normalization of Hong Kong interest rates and represents normal operations under the LERS. To enhance public understanding of these operations and the mechanisms of the LERS, the HKMA has been committed to explaining the technical details of the LERS and demonstrating the ability of Hong Kong's financial system to withstand shocks. The government has also firmly maintained the LERS. The stability of the foreign exchange and money markets further reinforces public confidence in the government's commitment and the Hong Kong dollar as a medium of exchange and store of value. During the 2018 Article IV consultation with the International Monetary Fund (IMF), the IMF reiterated its support for the LERS and noted that the LERS remains the most suitable currency system for Hong Kong, serving as a pillar of stability that helps ensure sustained economic growth, maintain competitiveness, and facilitate the smooth operation of the large financial services industry.

src_raw: 鑑於穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用，金管局繼續密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行的企業、物業相關及內地相關貸款的監管，以確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力。銀行持有大量外匯基金票據及債券，可經貼現窗用作換取港元流動資金，為利率大幅波動的情況提供有效緩衝。金管局隨時準備透過調整外匯基金票據及債券的發行量以提供額外流動性，以應對資金可能急劇流出港元的情況。金管局亦提醒市民審慎管理市場及利率風險，並為可能出現的市場波動作好準備。
mt_raw: Given the critical role of a sound banking system in the normal functioning of the LERS, the HKMA continues to closely monitor banks' credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as results from stress tests, and maintains oversight of banks' corporate, real estate-related, and mainland-related loans to ensure the banking system's resilience to shocks. Banks hold substantial amounts of Exchange Fund Bills and Notes, which can be used through the Discount Window to obtain Hong Kong dollar liquidity, providing effective buffer against significant interest rate fluctuations. The HKMA is prepared to adjust the issuance volume of Exchange Fund Bills and Notes to provide additional liquidity in response to potential sudden outflows of funds from the Hong Kong dollar. The HKMA also reminds the public to manage market and interest rate risks prudently and to prepare for possible market fluctuations.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2018年在107.8至109.9%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日為109.9%（圖5）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，能在面對突如其來的衝擊時為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強力後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance transparency of the Currency Board Accounts, since October 1998, certain assets of the Exchange Fund have been designated to support the monetary base. The backing ratio (the ratio of supporting assets to the monetary base) fluctuated between 107.8% and 109.9% in 2018, without touching the upper or lower limits. The ratio stood at 109.9% on December 31 (Figure 5). Under the LERS, although certain Exchange Fund assets have been designated as part of the backing portfolio, all Exchange Fund assets remain available to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. The substantial financial resources of the Exchange Fund provide a strong foundation to safeguard Hong Kong's monetary and financial stability in the face of unexpected shocks.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會（貨幣發行委員會）負責監察和探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2018年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括多國央行聯合退出非常規貨幣政策對在香港的境外銀行美元貸款供應造成的潛在影響、港元貨幣需求的利率敏感度，以及聯匯制度自3項優化措施以來的運作機制及理論。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Board Sub-Committee (CBC), under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee (EFAC), is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues relating to Hong Kong's monetary and financial stability. In 2018, the CBC discussed topics including the potential impact of central banks' joint withdrawal from unconventional monetary policies on the supply of offshore US dollar loans to banks in Hong Kong, the interest rate sensitivity of Hong Kong dollar monetary demand, and the operational mechanisms and theories of the LERS since the implementation of three optimization measures. Meeting records of the CBC and the HKMA's reports on the operations of the Currency Board system are available on the HKMA website.

src_raw: 香港金融研究中心（研究中心）繼續支持貨幣政策、銀行業及金融範疇的研究工作。過去4年，研究中心更着重政策方面的研究，從所舉辦的研討會及訪問學者計劃尤其可見一斑。一方面，研究中心與主要中央銀行及政策研究機構合作，聯合舉辦更多政策相關的研討會。另一方面，在2016年推出專題研究學者計劃，支持更多與金管局政策制定相關的研究項目。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Institute for Monetary Research (HKIMR) continues to support research work in the areas of monetary policy, banking, and finance. Over the past four years, the HKIMR has placed particular emphasis on policy-oriented research, as evidenced by its seminars and visiting fellow programmes. On one hand, the HKIMR collaborates with major central banks and policy research institutions to organize more policy-focused conferences. On the other hand, the HKIMR launched the Thematic Research Fellowship Programme in 2016 to support more research projects related to the HKMA's policy-making.

src_raw:
在2018年，研究中心合共邀請16位研究學者到訪，並發表了25份研究論文。年內研究中心亦舉辦了4場國際研討會：
- 於1月舉行的「第9屆中國經濟年度國際研討會」，主題為「中國房地產市場及其對經濟與金融穩定的影響」。研討會由研究中心、國務院發展研究中心市場經濟研究所及中國人民銀行金融研究所合辦，集中討論內地房地產市場相關的課題及風險。
- 於10月舉行由金管局及國際結算銀行合辦的「匯率與貨幣政策框架」研討會。研討會為國際結算銀行於香港的亞太區辦事處成立20周年的慶祝活動之一，旨在探討匯率在貨幣政策框架中的角色。
- 於11月舉行的「2018年中央銀行金融市場微結構的年度研討會」。研討會討論金融市場微結構理論研究、實證研究結果及近期發展相關的政策影響。
- 於11月舉行由金管局、歐洲中央銀行及美國聯邦儲備委員會合辦的「中國經濟的新時代」中國專家網絡研討會。研討會討論內地經濟正面對的迫切問題及其對全球經濟的影響，並特別着重與中央銀行決策者相關的政策議題。這是中國專家網絡研討會首次在歐洲以外地區舉行。
mt_raw:
In 2018, the HKIMR invited 16 researchers to visit and published 25 research papers. During the year, the HKIMR also organized four international conferences:
- The 9th Annual International Conference on the Chinese Economy held in January, themed "The Chinese Real Estate Market and Its Impact on Economic and Financial Stability." The conference, co-organized by the HKIMR, the Institute of Market Economy of the Development Research Centre of the State Council, and the Financial Research Institute of the People's Bank of China, focused on discussions regarding the Mainland's real estate market and associated risks.
- A conference titled "Exchange Rates and Monetary Policy Frameworks," hosted by the HKMA and the Bank for International Settlements (BIS) in October. This event marked the celebration of the 20th anniversary of the Asia Pacific Office of the BIS and aimed to explore the role of exchange rates in monetary policy frameworks.
- The Annual Central Bank Conference on the Microstructure of Financial Markets held in November. The conference discussed theoretical research, empirical findings, and policy implications related to recent developments in financial market microstructure.
- A China Expert Network (CEN) conference titled "The New Era of the Chinese Economy," jointly organized by the HKMA, the European Central Bank, and the Federal Reserve Board of Governors in November. The conference addressed pressing challenges facing the Mainland economy and their impact on the global economy, with a special focus on policy issues relevant to central bankers. This was the first CEN conference held outside Europe.

src_raw: 儘管環球經濟及金融市場的不確定性增加，2018年香港銀行體系維持穩健。認可機構的流動性及信用風險管理制度的成效繼續是金管局年內的監管重點。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加，以及銀行業更廣泛使用金融科技，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及業務操作恢復能力的監管。金管局亦於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本，並開始處理虛擬銀行認可申請。在操守監管方面，金管局採取進一步措施，加強監管認可機構銷售投資及保險產品的手法、促進為殘疾人士提供無障礙銀行服務，以及推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: Despite increasing uncertainties in the global economy and financial markets, the Hong Kong banking system remained sound in 2018. The effectiveness of liquidity and credit risk management systems of authorized institutions continued to be a key focus of the HKMA's supervisory work during the year. Given the rising cyber threats and the broader adoption of fintech by the banking sector, the HKMA enhanced its oversight of technology risk management and operational resilience of authorized institutions. In May, the HKMA issued the revised Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks and began processing applications for virtual bank authorization. In terms of conduct supervision, the HKMA took further measures to strengthen regulation of how authorized institutions sell investment and insurance products, promote barrier-free banking services for people with disabilities, and foster customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 隨着金融罪行越趨複雜及全球化，金管局繼續借助新科技及風險為本方法，加強香港打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力。金管局在香港落實國際監管標準方面進展理想，其中包括資本充足標準、披露標準、流動性標準及大額風險承擔限額。此外，金管局亦加強與銀行業的溝通接觸，確保在監管成效與市場發展兩者間取得適當平衡。
mt_raw: As financial crimes become increasingly complex and globalized, the HKMA continues to enhance Hong Kong's anti-money laundering and counter-financing of terrorism (AML/CFT) capabilities through new technologies and risk-based approaches. The HKMA has made satisfactory progress in implementing international regulatory standards, including capital adequacy standards, disclosure standards, liquidity standards, and large exposure limits. Additionally, the HKMA strengthened communication with the banking industry to achieve an appropriate balance between regulatory effectiveness and market development.

src_raw: 銀行可能因其營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、對危機作出應對，並自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks may affect the stability of the banking system due to their operating models, or in extreme cases, due to disorderly failures. As the regulatory authority, the Chief Executive of the HKMA plays an important role in safeguarding financial stability, ensuring that banks have the capability to withstand shocks, respond to crises, and return to normal operations, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The Chief Executive of the HKMA is responsible for prudential supervision of banks, as well as authorizing licensed banks, restricted license banks, and deposit-taking companies (collectively referred to as "authorized institutions"). The Chief Executive of the HKMA also oversees certain financial market infrastructures (FMIs).

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦非為了確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，即能有序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員於該機制之下作為包括認可機構在內的若干金融機構的處置機制當局。為建立運作暢順的香港處置機制，必須制定處置法例及政策標準、進行處置規劃以清除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置無法經營的認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局需要採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the Chief Executive of the HKMA cannot guarantee that the financial system is entirely free of risks, nor is the prudential regulatory framework designed to ensure "zero risk." As one of the resolution authorities, the Chief Executive of the HKMA aims to ensure that if an authorized institution becomes unsustainable, its failure can be handled in an orderly manner. To this end, Hong Kong has established a financial institution resolution mechanism, under which the Chief Executive of the HKMA serves as the resolution authority for certain financial institutions, including authorized institutions. To establish an effective Hong Kong resolution mechanism, it is necessary to develop resolution legislation and policy standards, carry out resolution planning to remove obstacles to the feasibility of resolving authorized institutions, and build the operational capacity of the HKMA to resolve unsound authorized institutions. To effectively implement these tasks, the HKMA needs to adopt internationally aligned and coordinated approaches.

src_raw: 金管局在2018年共進行187次非現場審查，涵蓋範圍廣泛，包括認可機構的CAMEL評級、企業管治、業務操作及風險管理，以及認可機構應對金融科技發展的業務策略。為繼續加強認可機構的風險管治水平，金管局與認可機構董事局或董事局轄下委員會共舉行27次會議，並跟進認可機構實施企業管治指引的進度。此外，金管局與認可機構及其外聘核數師共舉行28次三方聯席會議。
mt_raw: In 2018, the HKMA conducted 187 off-site reviews covering a wide range of areas, including CAMEL ratings of authorized institutions, corporate governance, business operations, and risk management, as well as the business strategies of authorized institutions in response to developments in fintech. To continue enhancing the risk governance levels of authorized institutions, the HKMA held 27 meetings with the boards of directors or committees of authorized institutions and followed up on the implementation progress of corporate governance guidelines. In addition, the HKMA held 28 tripartite meetings with authorized institutions and their external auditors.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局繼續進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行392次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查與評估的主要重點。其他重點為科技風險及業務操作風險管理，以及打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集管控措施。金管局亦增加針對流動性與市場風險管理，以及巴塞爾資本充足架構的實施情況的現場審查及專題評估次數。專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查。
mt_raw: Besides off-site review activities, the HKMA continued conducting regular on-site examinations, complemented by thematic reviews to examine higher-risk areas. The HKMA carried out 392 on-site examinations and thematic reviews during the year and continued to focus primarily on credit risk management in its examination and assessment processes. Other priorities included technology risk and operational risk management, as well as AML/CFT control measures. The HKMA also increased the number of on-site examinations and thematic reviews focusing on liquidity and market risk management, as well as the implementation status of the Basel capital adequacy framework. Thematic inspection teams also conducted on-site inspections of authorized institutions' securities, investment products, insurance, and mandatory provident fund (MPF)-related businesses.

mt_raw: The asset quality of authorized institutions remained sound in 2018. The specific classification loan ratio for retail banking declined from 0.56% at the end of 2017 to 0.50% at the end of 2018, far below the long-term average of 2.1% since 2000; during the same period, the specific classification loan ratio for the entire banking sector fell from 0.68% to 0.55%. Regarding mainland-related loans, the specific classification loan ratio for retail banking dropped from 0.75% to 0.63% in 2018, while the corresponding ratio for the entire banking sector decreased from 0.67% to 0.54%.

src_raw: 年內金管局加強監管，確保認可機構繼續採取審慎的信用風險管理準則。尤其金管局更主動了解大型企業的背景及結構，從而加強企業信用風險的監察制度。此外，金管局亦進行以主要信用風險管理監控措施為重點的專題評估，例如大型企業貸款的批核準則及風險管理、貸款分類及撥備制度、信用風險管治架構、地產發展商貸款的風險管理、有抵押貸款及保單抵押貸款等。
mt_raw: During the year, the HKMA intensified its supervision to ensure that authorized institutions continued to adhere to prudent credit risk management practices. In particular, the HKMA proactively examined the backgrounds and structures of large corporations to strengthen its monitoring of corporate credit risk. Furthermore, the HKMA conducted thematic reviews focusing on key credit risk management monitoring measures, such as approval criteria and risk management for large corporate loans, loan classification and provisioning systems, credit risk governance frameworks, risk management for real estate developers' loans, asset-backed financing, and insurance premium financing.

src_raw: 住宅物業價格在2018年7月到達歷史高位，但在下半年出現緩和跡象。金管局自2009年10月以來推出的8輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已增強香港銀行體系應對本港樓市可能逆轉的抵禦能力。新造住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數由2009年9月金管局推出首輪逆周期措施前的64%，降至2018年12月的46%。平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時的41%，降至2018年12月的34%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Residential property prices reached historical highs in July 2018 but showed signs of moderation in the second half of the year. The eight rounds of countercyclical macroprudential measures introduced by the HKMA since October 2009 have enhanced the Hong Kong banking system's ability to withstand potential reversals in the local property market. The average loan-to-value (LTV) ratio for new residential mortgages decreased from 64% before the first round of countercyclical measures in September 2009 to 46% in December 2018. The average debt servicing ratio (DSR) also declined from 41% when the DSR ceiling was first introduced in August 2010 to 34% in December 2018 (Figure 1).

src_raw: 銀行業面對的科技風險仍然偏高。金管局於2016年推出「網絡防衛評估框架」。第一期實施安排涵蓋包括所有大型銀行在內的30間認可機構，該等認可機構已完成3個階段的評估，即自身風險程度評估、成熟程度評估及（如適用）風險資訊主導網絡攻防模擬測試。有關評估有助認可機構查找需要改進的運作範疇及採取補救措施，加強網絡防衛。與此同時，金管局已制定第二及第三期實施安排的時間表，這兩期實施安排將涵蓋其餘認可機構。年內金管局進行現場審查，集中檢視認可機構的網絡保安管控措施、外判安排及資訊科技管治。
mt_raw: The banking sector continues to face high technology risks. The HKMA introduced the Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework (C-RAF) in 2016. The first phase of implementation covered 30 authorized institutions, including all major banks, which had completed three stages of assessments: inherent risk assessment, maturity assessment, and (where applicable) Cyber Attack Simulation Testing (iCAST). These assessments helped authorized institutions identify areas requiring improvement and take corrective actions to strengthen cybersecurity. At the same time, the HKMA has developed schedules for the second and third phases of implementation, which will cover the remaining authorized institutions. During the year, the HKMA conducted on-site examinations focused on reviewing the cybersecurity controls, outsourcing arrangements, and information technology governance of authorized institutions.

src_raw: 金管局繼續就2017年9月公布的7項推動智慧銀行的措施與銀行業合作，以促進金融科技在香港的發展。在監管層面，金管局於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本。此外，金管局在「銀行易」措施下，已經精簡有關遙距開戶、網上貸款及網上財富管理的監管要求。這些優化的監管要求有助銀行提供更佳的網上銀行用戶體驗。「銀行易」措施的工作範疇在9月擴大至促進銀行採用金融合規科技(Regtech)，而當中3個新的工作重點包括打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的監察科技、用於審慎風險管理和合規的金融合規科技，以及「機器可讀」的監管要求。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues to collaborate with the banking sector on seven initiatives to promote smart banking announced in September 2017, aiming to advance the development of fintech in Hong Kong. On the regulatory front, the HKMA issued the revised Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks in May. Additionally, under the Banking Made Easy initiative, the HKMA has streamlined regulatory requirements related to remote onboarding, online finance, and online wealth management. These optimized regulatory requirements help banks provide a better online banking user experience. The scope of the Banking Made Easy initiative was expanded in September to include promoting the adoption of regulatory technology (Regtech) by banks, with three new focal areas: AML/CFT surveillance technologies, Regtech for prudential risk management and compliance, and "machine-readable" regulatory requirements.

src_raw: 隨着美國貨幣政策持續正常化，金管局加強了流動性風險的監管，以確保認可機構審慎及有效地管理其流動性風險。年內金管局進行了一輪專題評估，以評估認可機構為美元流動性可能收緊所作的準備，以及其內部流動性壓力測試的能力。此外，金管局亦監察認可機構遵守於1月生效的「穩定資金淨額比率」要求的情況。
mt_raw: With the ongoing normalization of U.S. monetary policy, the HKMA strengthened its oversight of liquidity risk to ensure that authorized institutions manage their liquidity risk prudently and effectively. During the year, the HKMA conducted a round of thematic reviews to assess the preparedness of authorized institutions for possible tightening of USD liquidity and their internal liquidity stress-testing capabilities. In addition, the HKMA monitored the compliance of authorized institutions with the requirement of the Net Stable Funding Ratio (NSFR), which came into effect in January.

src_raw: 政府於4月發表的《香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估報告》指出，香港銀行體系面對高洗錢威脅，這與其他國際金融中心一樣，亦反映金融服務日趨全球化及複雜。香港面對的洗錢威脅除源自本地犯罪活動外，在更大程度上也來自境外活動。該等境外活動包括來自境外貪污活動的非法得益、跨國犯罪集團的詐騙活動、逃稅及基於香港作為支付及貿易樞紐的地位而引致與制裁相關的風險。在金管局協助下，政府制定打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集政策聲明，列載對該等威脅的回應，目標是在提高打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力的同時，又能吸引及便利正當企業。
mt_raw: The Government's April 2018 report on the risk assessment of money laundering and terrorist financing highlighted that the Hong Kong banking system faces high money laundering threats, similar to other international financial centers, reflecting the growing globalization and complexity of financial services. Hong Kong faces money laundering threats not only from local criminal activities but more significantly from overseas activities, including proceeds from foreign corruption, transnational crime group fraud activities, tax evasion, and risks associated with Hong Kong's position as a payment and trading hub. With the HKMA's assistance, the Government formulated an AML/CFT policy statement outlining responses to these threats, aiming to enhance the effectiveness of Hong Kong's AML/CFT system while attracting and facilitating legitimate businesses.

src_raw: 《2018年打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（金融機構）（修訂）條例》於3月1日生效，引入的修訂包括在核實客戶身分方面賦予靈活性，以配合認可機構利用科技方便客戶開戶的發展。新法例亦擴大適用範圍，規定律師、會計師、地產代理及信託或公司服務提供者須負上打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的責任，從而全面強化打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度。該等修訂連同《公司條例》為提高企業實益擁有權透明度而作出的修訂，有助認可機構執行打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面的工作。
mt_raw: The Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Financing of Terrorism (Financial Institutions) (Amendment) Ordinance 2018 came into force on 1 March, introducing amendments that grant flexibility in verifying customer identities to accommodate the development of technology-enabled account opening by authorized institutions. The new law also expands the scope of application, requiring lawyers, accountants, estate agents, and trust or company service providers to assume responsibility for combating money laundering and terrorist financing, thereby comprehensively strengthening the AML/CFT system. These amendments, along with revisions to the Companies Ordinance aimed at improving corporate beneficial ownership transparency, assist authorized institutions in carrying out their AML/CFT responsibilities.

src_raw: 隨着中國內地與香港資本市場的互聯互通計劃優化措施的落實，香港作為進入中國內地主要門戶的獨特地位進一步加強。「債券通」全面實施即時貨銀兩訖(DvP)結算模式及國務院宣布境外投資者投資中國境內債券市場的稅務寛免安排，進一步提升計劃的效率及吸引力。金管局亦與內地當局緊密合作，探討及實施多項金融配套措施，便利在粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）生活、工作及營商的個人和企業。香港離岸人民幣業務繼續蓬勃發展，人民幣存款資金池全年上升6%至6,577億元人民幣；人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額達到10,101億元人民幣的高水平。
mt_raw: With the implementation of optimized measures for the mutual connectivity programmes between the Mainland and Hong Kong capital markets, Hong Kong's unique position as the main gateway to the Mainland has been further strengthened. The full implementation of the real-time Delivery versus Payment (DvP) settlement mode for Bond Connect and the State Council's announcement of tax exemption arrangements for foreign investors investing in the Mainland bond market have further enhanced the efficiency and attractiveness of the programme. The HKMA has also closely collaborated with the Mainland authorities to explore and implement various financial support measures, facilitating individuals and businesses living, working, and operating in the GBA. Offshore RMB operations in Hong Kong continued to develop vigorously, with the RMB deposit pool increasing by 6% annually to RMB 657.7 billion; the average daily transaction volume of the RMB Real-Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system reached a high level of RMB 1.0101 trillion.

src_raw: 金管局積極開拓進一步提升香港金融平台競爭力的新機會。為促進香港債券市場的發展，金管局落實《財政預算案》所提出的「債券資助先導計劃」，為首次在香港發行債券的機構提供資助，並與政府緊密合作修訂法例，擴大「合資格債務票據計劃」下可獲稅務豁免的債券投資收入範圍。金管局亦加強市場推廣活動，向海外及內地持份者宣傳香港的優勢，包括舉辦多項大型及專題外展活動推廣香港為綠色金融、基建融資及企業財資中心樞紐。
mt_raw: The HKMA is actively exploring new opportunities to further enhance the competitiveness of Hong Kong's financial platform. To promote the development of Hong Kong's bond market, the HKMA implemented the "Pilot Bond Grant Scheme" proposed in the Budget initiative, providing funding for institutions issuing bonds for the first time in Hong Kong, and closely cooperating with the Government to revise legislation to expand the scope of bond investment income eligible for tax exemptions under the Qualifying Debt Instrument scheme. The HKMA has also intensified its market promotion activities to highlight Hong Kong's advantages, including organizing large-scale and special outreach events to promote Hong Kong as a hub for green finance, infrastructure financing, and corporate treasury centres.

src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港作為國際金融中心的地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2018年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The safe and effective operation of Hong Kong's financial infrastructure provides a solid foundation for Hong Kong's status as an international financial centre. The four RTGS systems handling interbank transactions, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU system), and the Hong Kong Trade Repository (HKTR) achieved 100% system availability in 2018, exceeding the target level of 99.95%. Through accounts at two central securities depositories in the Mainland, the CMU system continues to assist in settling "Bond Connect" northbound transactions, and holds mainland debt instruments for related CMU system members.

src_raw: 為促進零售支付業的整體安全及效率，金管局於8月根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）指定多兩個零售支付系統，使其運作受到金管局監察。迄今受金管局監察的指定零售支付系統增至6個。金管局亦對16個儲值支付工具持牌人進行監管。有關持牌人積極推出新產品及服務，致力為客戶提供更多選擇及更佳的用戶體驗。與此同時，電子支票與電子帳單及繳費服務涵蓋範圍，進一步擴展至包括香港與整個廣東省的跨境支付交易。
mt_raw: To promote the overall safety and efficiency of the retail payment sector, the HKMA designated two additional retail payment systems in August under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (PSSVFO), bringing the total number of designated retail payment systems monitored by the HKMA to six. The HKMA also regulates 16 stored value facility (SVF) licensees. These licensees actively introduce new products and services, striving to provide customers with more choices and better user experiences. At the same time, electronic cheque and electronic bill presentment and payment services have expanded their coverage to include cross-border payment transactions between Hong Kong and the entire Guangdong Province.

terms: {'接口': 'endpoint', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行界': 'banking sector', '開放': 'liberalisation'}
src_raw: 開放API是指透過向第三方服務供應商開放銀行的相關數據，更好更方便地融合銀行與其他行業的服務。用家單用一個系統就能在安全環境下享受綜合服務。為促進銀行界研發及提供開放API，金管局於7月發布開放API框架。該框架採用風險為本原則，並分4個階段落實各項開放API功能。截至2019年1月底，20間銀行已開放第一階段約500個開放API接口，涵蓋逾1,000項產品及服務的資料。
mt_raw: An open API refers to the practice of opening up a bank's relevant data to third-party service providers, allowing for better and more convenient integration of banking services with other industries. Users can enjoy integrated services within a secure environment through a single system. To promote the development and provision of open APIs in the banking sector, the HKMA released an open API framework in July. The framework adopts a risk-based approach and implements open API features in four stages. As of January 2019, 20 banks had opened the first phase of approximately 500 open API interfaces, covering information on over 1,000 products and services.

src_raw: 建基於金管局主導的貿易融資概念驗證成果由香港多間銀行組成的聯盟於10月啟動以分布式分類帳技術(DLT)為基礎的貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」。該平台旨在透過數碼化貿易文件及自動化貿易融資流程，減低失誤及詐騙風險。截至2018年底，已有12間銀行加入成為該聯盟成員。「貿易聯動」與歐洲貿易融資平台「we.trade」於10月簽署《諒解備忘錄》，進行對接雙方平台的概念驗證。金管局亦同步探討「貿易聯動」與其他地區對接的機會，包括與新加坡金融管理局合作推出「全球貿易連接網絡」。
mt_raw: Based on the results of the trade finance proof-of-concept led by the HKMA, a consortium of banks in Hong Kong launched the eTradeConnect platform in October, which is based on distributed ledger technology (DLT). The platform aims to reduce errors and fraud risks by digitizing trade documents and automating trade finance processes. By the end of 2018, 12 banks had joined the consortium. eTradeConnect signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the European trade finance platform we.trade in October to conduct concept verification of interoperability between the two platforms. The HKMA is also exploring opportunities to connect eTradeConnect with other regions, including the "Global Trade Connectivity Network" project with the Monetary Authority of Singapore.

src_raw: 繼於2017年與深圳市人民政府金融發展服務辦公室（深圳金融辦）簽署《諒解備忘錄》後，金管局繼續加強與深圳的金融科技合作。當中包括金管局贊助「深圳金融科技暑期實習計劃」，讓50名學生到深圳多間著名公司進行為期6星期的實習，體驗當地的金融科技生態；另與深圳金融辦第二次合辦「深港金融科技創新獎」。

src_raw: 2018年對投資者而言是困難的一年，投資環境備受多項風險因素困擾，包括美國利率持續正常化引發金融狀況收緊、主要經濟體之間的貿易摩擦升級，以及全球多處民粹主義抬頭及地緣政治風險加劇。環球股市普遍向下，美國國庫券收益率亦隨着美國聯邦儲備局4次加息而上升。在美息趨升下，美元轉強。部分新興市場面對國內嚴峻的政治及經濟壓力，其貨幣顯著下挫。儘管投資環境充滿挑戰，外匯基金在2018年仍錄得109億港元投資收入。
mt_raw: 2018 was a difficult year for investors, as investment environments were troubled by multiple risk factors, including tightened financial conditions due to the continued normalization of US interest rates, escalation of trade tensions between major economies, and rising populism and geopolitical risks across the globe. Global stock markets generally declined, and US Treasury yields increased along with four interest rate hikes by the US Federal Reserve. With rising US interest rates, the US dollar strengthened. Some emerging markets faced severe domestic political and economic pressures, leading to significant depreciation of their currencies. Despite the challenging investment environment, the Exchange Fund recorded investment income of HK$10.9 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 根據《外匯基金條例》，外匯基金的首要目的是直接或間接影響港元匯價，亦可運用於保持香港貨幣及金融體系穩定健全，藉此保持香港作為國際金融中心的地位。金管局根據財政司司長轉授的權力及轉授權力的條款，就外匯基金的運用及投資管理向財政司司長負責。
mt_raw: Under the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the primary objective of the Exchange Fund is to directly or indirectly influence the exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar, and may also be used to maintain the soundness and stability of Hong Kong's monetary and financial system, thereby preserving Hong Kong's status as an international financial centre. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), acting under powers delegated by the Financial Secretary, is responsible to the Financial Secretary for the management and investment of the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 外匯基金大致上分成兩個主要組合：支持組合及投資組合。支持組合持有流通性極高的美元資產，按照貨幣發行局制度的規定為貨幣基礎提供十足支持。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債市及股市，以保障資產的價值及長期購買力。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund is broadly divided into two main portfolios: the backing portfolio and the investment portfolio. The backing portfolio holds highly liquid US dollar assets, providing full support for the monetary base in accordance with the Currency Board system. src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產分散投資至較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一及未來基金與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and enhance medium-term returns, the HKMA has gradually diversified part of the Exchange Fund's assets into more diversified asset classes, including emerging market and Mainland China debt and equity securities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. Emerging market and Mainland China debt and equity securities are held in the investment portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held in the Long-Term Growth Portfolio (LTGP). The maximum market value of the LTGP is one-third of the accumulated surplus of the Exchange Fund plus the sum of the portion of future fund and Exchange Fund subsidiary company deposits linked to the LTGP.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，即投資基準反映的配置情況，顯示外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，對資產進行戰略性配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內選持倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund's investment procedures are based on strategic asset allocation and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation, reflecting the configuration shown in the investment benchmark, indicates the long-term asset allocation that the Exchange Fund can make to achieve its investment objectives. The Exchange Fund uses the strategic allocation as a guide to conduct tactical asset allocation to seek returns exceeding the benchmark. Therefore, the actual allocation often deviates from the benchmark allocation (also known as the strategic allocation), and the difference between the actual and benchmark allocations is called "tactical deviation." After consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, the Financial Secretary sets the investment benchmark and tracking error limits, and the HKMA is authorized to determine the tactical asset allocation and establish the allowable range of tactical deviations. Portfolio managers can select holdings within the allowable range of tactical deviations to profit from short-term market fluctuations.

src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，突顯風險管理的重要。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂立嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並密切監察對指引及法規的遵守情況。金管局已加強風險評估，以配合外匯基金越趨多元化的投資；另採用風險管控工具來評估在正常及極度不利市況下的市場風險。金管局亦進行詳細的投資表現因素分析，以識別促成不同表現的成因，藉此評估如何充分利用內部及外聘投資經理的投資管理技術。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, the importance of risk management has become more pronounced. The HKMA has implemented strict control measures and investment guidelines for both internal and external fund manager-managed portfolios, and closely monitors compliance with these guidelines and regulations. The HKMA has enhanced its risk assessments to match the increasingly diversified investments of the Exchange Fund, and employs risk-control tools to assess market risks under normal and extremely adverse market conditions. The HKMA also conducts detailed performance attribution analyses to identify the causes behind different performance outcomes, thereby evaluating how to effectively utilize the investment management capabilities of both internal and external fund managers.

src_raw: 金管局支持負責任投資。例如，金管局已採納證券及期貨事務監察委員會公布的《負責任的擁有權原則》。該套原則旨在協助投資者釐定如何以最佳方法履行其於香港上市公司投資的擁有權責任。就外匯基金的管理而言，金管局已就環境、社會及管治因素制定內部指引，適用於外聘基金經理的甄選、委任及監察程序。獲委任負責主動式管理香港股票組合的外聘基金經理，須在管理有關投資時遵守《負責任的擁有權原則》。整體而言，金管局已將環境、社會及管治因素納入投資及相關監察活動的內部程序。金管局會密切注視環境、社會及管治因素的相關標準的發展，並評估如何能夠將這些標準進一步融入投資程序。此外，為促進負責任投資的國際合作，金管局已成為非牟利組織FCLTGlobal的成員，該組織旨在推動長遠目標為本的業務及投資決定。
mt_raw: The HKMA supports responsible investment. For example, the HKMA has adopted the Securities and Futures Commission's (SFC) "Principles for Responsible Ownership," which aims to help investors determine the best way to fulfill their ownership responsibilities regarding investments in Hong Kong-listed companies. Regarding the management of the Exchange Fund, the HKMA has developed internal guidelines on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors applicable to the selection, appointment, and monitoring processes of external fund managers. External fund managers appointed to actively manage Hong Kong equity portfolios must comply with the "Principles for Responsible Ownership" when managing these investments. Overall, the HKMA has integrated ESG factors into its internal procedures for investment and related oversight activities. The HKMA will closely monitor developments in relevant ESG standards and evaluate how these standards can be further incorporated into the investment process. In addition, to promote international cooperation in responsible investment, the HKMA has become a member of the not-for-profit organisation FCLTGlobal, which aims to encourage business and investment decisions focused on long-term goals.

mt_raw: In the bond markets, US Treasury yields generally rose in 2018 due to the normalization of US monetary policy. However, the bond market still experienced volatility during the year.
